ddls:
CREATE TABLE "configuration_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration parameter */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration parameter (e.g., javax.xml.stream.isValidating) */,
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* ID of the behavior */,
  "return_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the return type */,
  "default_value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the default value */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the requirement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration parameter */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the parameter */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the parameter was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the parameter */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_parameters_return_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("return_type_id") REFERENCES return_types ("return_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_parameters_default_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("default_value_id") REFERENCES default_values ("default_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_parameters_behavior_id FOREIGN KEY ("behavior_id") REFERENCES behaviors ("behavior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_parameters_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES requirements ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "behaviors" (
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavior */,
  "behavior_name" TEXT /* Name of the behavior */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the behavior */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the behavior */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the behavior was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the behavior */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the behavior was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavior_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "return_types" (
  "return_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return type */,
  "return_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the return type (e.g., Boolean, String) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the return type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the return type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the return type was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the return type */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the return type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "default_values" (
  "default_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each default value */,
  "default_value_name" TEXT /* Name of the default value (e.g., False, True) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the default value */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the default value */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the default value was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the default value */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the default value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("default_value_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "requirement_name" TEXT /* Name of the requirement (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the requirement */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the requirement */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the requirement was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the requirement */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the requirement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration parameter */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the configuration parameter */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_versions_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES configuration_parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the permission */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user-role mapping */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user-role mapping was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user-role mapping */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user-role mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_visibilities" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration parameter */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the parameter-role mapping */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the parameter-role mapping was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the parameter-role mapping */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the parameter-role mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration parameter */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the history entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the history entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the history entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_history_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES configuration_parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration parameter */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the comment */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_comments_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES configuration_parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration parameter */,
  "attachment_file" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the attachment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the attachment */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_attachments_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES configuration_parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration parameter */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES configuration_parameters ("parameter_id")
)
